description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof, situated on a large rectangular lot with a driveway and a car parked in front. The house features a minimalist design with clean lines, white exterior walls, and large windows, some of which are set in asymmetrical arrangements. The property is bordered by a row of tall, slender trees and includes a green lawn area, a paved driveway, and a small front garden with shrubs. The main entryway is accessible via a short path from the driveway and is marked by a simple door with a small overhang. The rear and side sections of the house are more enclosed, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential context with ample outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white walls, large windows, and a driveway with a car, surrounded by a lawn and tall trees.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front of the house, showing the driveway, car, main entryway, and a row of trees along the left and front edges.
description_view_1: From this angle, the house's front facade, driveway, and the full row of trees along the left side are visible, emphasizing the open lawn and entry path.
description_view_2: This side view shows the rear and side of the house, with fewer windows and a more enclosed appearance, as well as the continuation of the lawn and tree border.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the rear garden area, the flat roof, and the arrangement of trees along the back and right side, with the house's private sections more prominent.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small overhang, accessed by a short path from the driveway, minimal decorative elements
